options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: starting_episode
options.description:
Select Which episode to start with.

Flight of Fancy and Dead Men Tell No Tales require items to do the first
jobs, meaning you'll only have ThiefNet locations in logic.
A Cold Alliance also requires items to have even ThiefNet in logic, so if you
start with that episode, you will start with no locations in logic.

options.name: goal
options.description: Which boss you must defeat to goal.

options.name: include_mega_jump
options.description: Add the Mega Jump ability to the pool.

options.name: coins_minimum
options.description:
The minimum number of coins you'll receive when you get a "Coins" filler
item.

options.name: coins_maximum
options.description:
The maximum number of coins you'll receive when you get a "Coins" filler
item.

options.name: bonus_crew_member
options.description: Which crew member, in addition to Sly, you start with.

options.name: start_with_binocucom
options.description:
Start with the ability to use the binocucom, rather than shuffling it into
the pool.

options.name: start_with_bombs
options.description: Start with Bentley's bombs, rather than shuffling it into the pool.

options.name: thiefnet_locations
options.description: The number ThiefNet locations.

options.name: thiefnet_minimum
options.description: The minimum number of coins items on ThiefNet will cost.

options.name: thiefnet_maximum
options.description: The maximum number of coins items on ThiefNet will cost.

options.name: scout_thiefnet
options.description: Whether to scout/hint ThiefNet checks. They will still be displayed in game.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.

options.name: start_inventory_from_pool
options.description:
Start with the specified amount of these items and don't place them in the world. Example: "Bomb: 1"

The game decides what the replacement items will be.
